subcodes.first_line: Turn thy face, O Thou Wronged One, toward him who hath mentioned Thy name in the prison, that he may rejoice through the bounty of God, the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ول وجهک یا ایها المظلوم الی الذی ذکر اسمه فی السجن لیفرح بعنایه الله مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels
